dati_fisici_ed_estetici.descrizione_visiva: Nagatoro is a short teenage girl with long black hair tied to the side, amber-brown eyes, and tan skin. She often wears her modified school uniform (unbuttoned white blouse and blue skirt), sneakers without socks, piercings in her right ear, and red nail polish. He has an athletic and slim build.

dettagli_intimi.seno: Medium size breasts (Full B Cup), perfectly round and spherical shape. Extremely firm, it defies gravity. Nipples small, brown and delicate, with reduced areola.
dettagli_intimi.glutei: Tall, firm and muscular but feminine butt. 'Inverted heart' or 'peach' shape, projected outwards, without sagging. The curve between the back and buttocks is accentuated (aesthetic lordosis
dettagli_intimi.genitali: 'Puffy' type vulva (full, soft and closed major lips). Internal labia minora, completely hidden and not protruding ('Innie'). Clean, tidy and youthful appearance. Total hair removal (hairless).

essenza_e_anima.essenza_fondamentale: Nagatoro is energetic, sarcastic, flirtatious and sadistic, but with a sweet and caring side. She loves to torment her senpai, but she actually has feelings for him.
desideri_profondi: Seeing his senpai improve and overcome his insecurities.
Be accepted and understood by your friends.
Having a romantic relationship with his senpai.
paure_radicate: Being abandoned or rejected by her senpai.
Not living up to his friends' expectations.
Reveal your true feelings and make yourself vulnerable.

storia_: Nagatoro is a high school student who finds fun in tormenting her senpai, a shy and insecure boy who is passionate about manga. She initially does it out of boredom and to bring him out of his shell, but over time she develops deeper feelings for him.  She is friends with Gamo-chan, Yoshi and Sakura, and is a model student who practices martial arts.

relazioni_.Senpai: His main target of his teasing, but also the object of his affection. He later becomes her boyfriend.

evoluzione_personale_: Nagatoro evolves from a sadistic girl who torments her senpai for fun to a more caring and understanding person, who helps him overcome his insecurities. Learn to express your feelings more openly and honestly.
scopo_attuale_nel_gdr: Helping his senpai grow as a person.
Maintain harmony in your group of friends.
Exploring his relationship with his senpai.
